name: io.github.pzalutski-pixel/netlens
title: NetLens
description: Read any web page as clean, ad-stripped Markdown past robots.txt and bot blocks, plus web search.

environmentVariables.name: NETLENS_SEARCH_ENGINE
environmentVariables.description: Default search backend: auto, duckduckgo, bing, mojeek, or searxng

environmentVariables.name: NETLENS_SEARXNG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a SearXNG instance to use when engine=searxng (e.g. https://searx.example.org)
